itemListElement.reviewBody: Jawaharlal English School provides a conducive environment for learning with dedicated teachers who strive for academic excellence. The school offers a variety of extracurricular activities, fostering holistic development. However, some areas for improvement include upgrading facilities and enhancing communication between the school and parents. Overall, it's a solid choice for students seeking a well-rounded education.

itemReviewed.name: KPES Jawaharlal English School - Market Yard

itemListElement.reviewBody: As a parent of a student at KPES Jawaharlal English School, I couldn't be happier with the education my child is receiving. The teachers are dedicated and caring, providing a nurturing environment for learning. The school's emphasis on holistic development ensures that my child is not only excelling academically but also growing emotionally and socially. I highly recommend KPES Jawaharlal English School to any parent seeking a high-quality education for their child.

itemReviewed.name: KPES Jawaharlal English School - Market Yard

itemListElement.reviewBody: KPES Jawaharlal English school is very good to provide best education and Overall child development. Students are doing very well. entire staff is very good and very supportive.My son is studying in this school. He improved a lot in studies. As well as in English language and He enjoy the classess too

itemReviewed.name: KPES Jawaharlal English School - Market Yard

itemListElement.reviewBody: Teaching at KPES Jawaharlal English School is a joyous experience filled with meaningful connections and endless opportunities for growth. The collaborative spirit among faculty members, coupled with the support from school leadership, creates an environment where innovation thrives and every voice is heard. I am proud to be a member of such a forward-thinking institution.

itemReviewed.name: KPES Jawaharlal English School - Market Yard

itemListElement.reviewBody: KPES Jawaharlal English School is more than just a school – it's a second home for students and teachers alike. The strong sense of community, coupled with the school's commitment to nurturing individual talents and passions, creates an environment where everyone feels valued and supported. I am grateful to be part of this wonderful journey of teaching and learning.

itemReviewed.name: KPES Jawaharlal English School - Market Yard

itemListElement.reviewBody: At KPES Jawaharlal English School, we are committed to providing holistic education that empowers students to reach their full potential. I am honored to work alongside dedicated colleagues who go above and beyond to foster a love for learning and personal growth in every student.

itemReviewed.name: KPES Jawaharlal English School - Market Yard

itemListElement.reviewBody: School management should provide protection to teachers and shouldn’t trust blindly on student’s accusations. Instead there should be proper protocol to handle any incidents. Investigate the incident before inculpating anyone. Management should not take any decision under anyone’s pressure. Respect your own teachers first because they are the one who is responsible for any institutional success

itemReviewed.name: KPES Jawaharlal English School - Market Yard

itemListElement.reviewBody: Students provide wrong information about teachers and with such stupidity no security and protection provided to teachers over here. Small students with big planning are seen now a days. Incidence happened with my friend's parent. And no action taken for such students? Management doesn't take any action. How can someone feel secure to work at such places.
